sources.title: The Blood Beast Terror 1968
sources.description: In 19th century London, macabre murders shock the local countryside.

metadata.Plot: A scientist, working with genetics, creates a creature that is capable of transforming back and forth between a giant Death Head moth and a beautiful woman. The creature masquerades as his daughter when she is in her human incarnation and feeds on the blood of her victims when she is in the moth form.
metadata.Actors: Peter Cushing, Robert Flemyng, Wanda Ventham
